name: AWARE INC /MA/
summary: Aware, Inc. is a biometric identification company providing software solutions for government and commercial customers to enroll, identify, authenticate, and manage identities. Its portfolio includes AwareSDK (mobile biometric authentication), AwareABIS (large-scale biometric identification), AFIX Suite (law enforcement fingerprint identification), Awareness Platform (biometric integration iPaaS), WebEnroll (browser-based enrollment), Nexa SDKs (fingerprint, face, iris, voice matching), and JPEG2000 imaging products. Aware serves border control, law enforcement, national defense, mobile enrollment, and secure transaction markets globally.

products.name: AwareSDK
products.description: Mobile biometric authentication framework supporting facial recognition and voice authentication with SaaS and perpetual license options.

products.name: AwareSDK SaaS (formerly AwareID)
products.description: Cloud-based identity verification and authentication service with biometric face/voice matching, liveness detection, and document validation.

products.name: AwareABIS
products.description: Automated biometric identification system for large-scale 1:N and 1:1 fingerprint, face, and iris recognition with deduplication.

products.name: AFIX Tracker
products.description: Small-scale law enforcement fingerprint, palmprint, and latent print identification system for 15,000 to 2 million identities.

products.name: AFIX Suite
products.description: Suite including AFIX Face, AFIX Verifier, AFIX Identifier, AFIX Comparator, AFIX Engine, and ANTE for law enforcement biometrics.

products.name: Awareness Platform (BioSP)
products.description: Biometric integration platform-as-a-service for data processing, workflow management, and large-scale fingerprint, face, and iris recognition.

products.name: WebEnroll
products.description: Browser-based biometric enrollment and data management solution for capturing biographic data, fingerprints, and facial images.

products.name: Nexa SDKs
products.description: Biometric search and match SDKs for fingerprint, face, iris, and voice identification including Nexa|Fingerprint, Nexa|Face, Nexa|Iris, Nexa|Voice.

products.name: AwareXM
products.description: MINEX-certified, INCITS 378-compliant fingerprint minutiae extraction, template generation, and authentication SDK.

products.name: Aware JPEG 2000
products.description: Image compression product based on JPEG2000 standard, primarily used for medical imaging applications.

products.name: BioComponents
products.description: Biometric capture components with user interface supporting fingerprint, facial image autocapture and hardware abstraction.

partnerships.description: Used as distribution channel to sell biometrics software products and services globally.
Original equipment manufacturers used as part of multifaceted global distribution strategy.
VARs used as distribution partners for global sales of biometrics software products.
